data.answer_text: Photosynthesis ka matlab hai ki paudhe khud ka khana banate hain. Samjho ke paudhe ek wrestler hai, jo sunlight, paani aur carbon dioxide se apna khana bana raha hai. Paudhe ke andar chhoti-chhoti kitchens hoti hain jo 'chloroplasts' kehlate hain, wahan ye sab hota hai. Sunlight se energy milti hai jo khana banane mein madad karti hai. Toh bacho, samajh gaye na, photosynthesis ke funde? Kya main isko aur simply samjhaoon?
data.title: Understanding Photosynthesis
bullets: In plants, photosynthesis is like making food using sunlight.
Plants have little 'kitchens' called chloroplasts where this happens.
They take sunlight, water (like rain from the sky), and carbon dioxide (like the air we breathe out), and make food.
data.example: Samjho ke paudhe ek wrestler hai, jisne tractor se sunlight, paani aur carbon dioxide gather kiya aur khana banaya.
data.recap: Photosynthesis is like plants cooking food with sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide.
data.response_text: Photosynthesis ka matlab hai ki paudhe khud ka khana banate hain. Samjho ke paudhe ek wrestler hai, jo sunlight, paani aur carbon dioxide se apna khana bana raha hai. Paudhe ke andar chhoti-chhoti kitchens hoti hain jo 'chloroplasts' kehlate hain, wahan ye sab hota hai. Sunlight se energy milti hai jo khana banane mein madad karti hai. Toh bacho, samajh gaye na, photosynthesis ke funde? Kya main isko aur simply samjhaoon?
